title: aristolochia pontica var. iberica
intro: Aristolochia pontica var. iberica, also known as Iberian birthwort, is a plant species belonging to the Aristolochiaceae family, characterized by its unique, heart-shaped leaves and twisted, cordate-shaped flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Iberian birthwort include reducing inflammation, fighting oxidative stress, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Aristolochia pontica var. iberica is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity and side effects.
